items.title: Below average event
items.summary: 500 bucks for event. The anniversary is for spenders 250 pull of 60 dollars. This events are pay heavy. I recommend choas zero nightmare for a different games. Morimens sucks and probably one of the worst gacha games out and no wonder and YouTubers help me make decision how bad it is. Just started playing to. I quit. I recommend people to quit also. Game probably not going to last long from this point. If you enjoy the game. Then play.
